content.en:
There is no holy place.

The legendary realm of Longgu, the legendary realm lord Teng Dove, the legendary realm lord Barren River, the legendary realm lord He Mu, the legendary realm lord Zhenguang.

These five Legendary Realm Lords appeared to protect the Dharma for the Frostless Lords.

Although there are more than five Legendary Realm Lords in the True Saintless Holy Land, it is not necessary for all of the Legendary Realm Lords to protect the Dharma.

Moreover, if the Frostless Lord attacks the Legendary Realm Lord, there may not be a Legendary Realm Lord to cause trouble.

"Frost-free, are you ready?"

Lord Dragongu asked.

"Ready!" said Lord Frostless

"Let's get started!"

Lord Dragongu: They entered the Kukai with Lord Frostless.

Kukai represents space, and the river of time represents time.

In fact, the Kukai and the River of Time are in a separate place, but they are in two areas, and some people put the Kukai and the River of Time together, comparing them to the River of Time and Space, but in fact, in the eyes of the lords of the Legendary Realm, they are still separate

However, at the end of the long river of time and the end of the empty sea, the two converge in one place, and if the peak legendary realm leader mainly attacks the eternal master, he needs to go to the end of the long river of time and the empty sea to attack.

For example, the treasure land that Ye Tian entered in the depths of the Time Constant Gold Vein before was a treasure land formed at the convergence of the empty sea and the long river of time.

The half-step Legendary Realm Lord will inevitably enter the Kukai or the Long River of Time when he attacks the Legendary Realm Lord, while the Frostless Lord controls the space, so he will impact the Legendary Realm Lord in the Kuhai.

Whoa!!

The five Legendary Realm Lords and Frostless Lords have all entered the empty sea, surrounded by endless space power, and endless space squeezing is coming, if there is no Legendary Realm Lord's strength, or if he controls the space, even a half-step Legendary Realm Lord will be unable to stay here for a long time, just like a half-step Legendary Realm Lord cannot stay in the long river of time for a long time.

At this time.

The Five Legendary Realm Lords protected this area, allowing the Frostless Lords to attack with peace of mind.

"Frostless, don't worry about breaking through, we won't let other Legendary Realm Lords come to disturb you." Lord Longgu said.

"Hmm!"

With five Legendary Realm Lord Protectors, the Frostless Lord is also extremely calm and doesn't worry about anything.

Immediately, she began to attack the Legendary Realm Lord

If you control the space, you can also control the power here, and break the shackles in the underworld through the power of Kukai, so as to become the embodiment of space, and completely merge yourself with space.

In this way, you can be promoted to the Lord of the Legendary Realm.

Without entering the space, there is no way to break the shackles, and there is no way to be promoted to the lord of the Legendary Realm.

Boom ∪!!

The Frostless Lord controlled the space here, and the endless spatial power poured into his body, and his body gradually became one with the space, impacting the shackles in the underworld.

The five Legendary Realm lords don't have anything to worry about in front of them, because the enemy will come to interrupt the breakthrough, and it is impossible to come over now.

The best time to really break is when the Frostless Lord and the space power are completely unified, and the moment when the incarnation of the space is interrupted, the Frostless Lord will be counterattacked by the empty sea, although it will not fall, but once it is counterattacked, it will be a little difficult to impact the Legendary Realm Lord again in the future.

Time passed slowly, and the Frostless Lord was getting closer and closer to becoming a spatial incarnation, and the aura on his body was getting stronger and stronger.

At this time, the five Legendary Realm Lords began to be solemn, constantly spying around, lest a large number of Legendary Realm Lords invade here.

After another period of time, the Frostless Lord broke through to the most critical time and space.

Rumble!

The Frostless Lord instantly swallowed the infinite space, his body became spatialized, and the aura of the Legendary Realm Lord began to permeate his body.

And at this moment, an arrow pierced through, ignoring Kukai's power.

"It's the Star Lord's Star Arrow!"

The expressions of the five Legendary Realm Lords changed.

Just when the Star Arrow was about to ignore everything and attack the Frostless Lord's body, the Shocklight Lord sacrificed an eternal treasure - the Lightless Shield!

Bang!

The Lightless Shield deflects the Star Arrow, stopping the Star Lord's attack.

And in the next moment, the Frostless Lord completely broke through and became the Lord of the Legendary Realm, and a powerful aura permeated out.

Shout!

The Star Arrow disappeared, and the Star Lord's voice came: "Hmph, count you lucky!"

The five Legendary Realm Lords didn't chase and kill, so it was difficult to really kill the Trickster Star Lord.

"Shocklight, thanks to your Lightless Shield, if it weren't for the eternal nature of the Lightless Shield's unstoppable object, it would have been really difficult for us to stop the Star Lord's Star Arrow. "Lord Longgu said.

Lord Zhenguang said: "At the beginning, the Star Lord used the Star Arrow to shoot a Legendary Realm Lord of our True Saintless Land, so I took great pains to obtain the Lightless Shield, otherwise, we can avoid the Star Arrow by ourselves, but it is a little difficult to block the Star Arrow, unless it is the peak Legendary Realm Lord who can block the Star Arrow." "

Pinnacle Legendary Realm!

This is the pinnacle realm of the Legendary Realm Lord, there is no such Legendary Realm Lord in the True Infinite Holy Land, and there is only one such Legendary Realm Lord in the entire Infinite Sea.

If the True Immortal Land has a peak Legendary Realm Lord, then it is almost an invincible existence among the Legendary Realm Lords, who would dare to provoke the True Immortal Realm?

It's a pity that it is too difficult to give birth to a peak Legendary Realm Lord, and there are not many Peak Legendary Realm Lords in the entire Void Region, many Eternal Seas.

At this time, the Frostless Lord had basically stabilized his realm.

"'Congratulations to the Lord of Frost for his ascension to the Lord of the Legendary Realm. "

"Congratulations to the Lord of Frost on his arrival in the Lord of the Legendary Realm. "

"Congratulations to the Lord of Frost on his arrival in the Lord of the Legendary Realm. "

"Hahahaha, we really have another Legendary Realm Lord in the Holy Land, and our strength has grown again!"

The five Legendary Realm Lords said excitedly.

The Frostless Lord also said gratefully: "Thank you for the support of the five people, otherwise Frostless is afraid that the breakthrough will be interrupted by the (good) Star Lord." "

"This is as it should be, let's go back and hold a feast for you, so that the entire Infinite Sea will know that we have truly given birth to a Legendary Realm Lord in the Holy Land. Lord Longgu said

Subsequently.

They returned to the True Void Holy Land and announced the news.

Suddenly, the countless members of the True Infinite Holy Land were extremely excited, and the many forces of the Infinite Sea were also extremely shocked.

It has been a long time since the Infinite Sea had given birth to a Legendary Realm Lord, but now one has been born.

"The Frostless Lord has broken through to the Legendary Realm Lord, it's really fast!"

After Ye Tian found out, he sighed to his father.

As soon as he entered the Legendary Realm Lord, the identity and status of the Frostless Lord in the True Void Holy Land were completely different, and he was already on an equal footing with the Dragon Gu Lord, and he was the highest level of the True Void Saint Land.

"It's time for me to work hard and strive to break through to the Transcendent Legendary Lord realm as soon as possible. "

Ye Tian muttered. _
